name: js_unshroud
description: Headless JavaScript monitoring and analysis tool
author: Evan H. Dygert

scripts.build:all: npm run build:linux && npm run build:macos && npm run build:macos-arm && npm run build:windows
scripts.release:linux: npm run build:linux && bun scripts/package-release.ts js_unshroud-linux-x64
scripts.release:macos: npm run build:macos && bun scripts/package-release.ts js_unshroud-macos-x64
scripts.release:macos-arm: npm run build:macos-arm && bun scripts/package-release.ts js_unshroud-macos-arm64
scripts.release:windows: npm run build:windows && bun scripts/package-release.ts js_unshroud-windows-x64.exe
scripts.release:all: npm run release:linux && npm run release:macos && npm run release:macos-arm && npm run release:windows
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
